micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.
Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.
Use value entries in conditions and function entries in actions.

rows.command_eng: Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
rows.output: {"name":"EveryHourRepeatOpenCloseDoor","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#Clock).clock_minute == 0) { delay(1 HOUR) } if ((#Clock).clock_minute == 0) { (#Door).windowcovering_uporopen() } delay(1 HOUR) if ((#Clock).clock_minute == 0) { (#Door).windowcovering_downorclose() }"}
